posts.author: emmanuelkatto23 (Emmanuel Katto )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone, I am Emmanuel Katto. I’ve been exploring the use of custom status columns in Monday.com to manage project progress. What are some creative or effective ways you’ve utilized custom statuses to enhance project tracking?

I look forward to your responses.

Thanks in advance,
Emmanuel Katto
